chunks.text:
# Enterprise ERP Business Glossary

## Sales & Customer Management

### Customer
**Definition**: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from the company. Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

**Attributes**: customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, credit_limit, payment_terms, tax_id, registration_date, status

**Related Concepts**: Sales Order, Invoice, Payment, Customer Address, Credit Score
... [TRUNCATED]

## Inventory & Warehousing

### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status

**Related Concepts**: Inventory Transaction, Bin Location, Warehouse Zone, Stock Transfer

### Inventory Transaction
**Definition**: A record of any movem... [TRUNCATED]

## Human Resources

### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id

**Related Concepts**: Department, Position, Employee Compensation, Time Entry, Performance Review

### Department
**Definition**: An... [TRUNCATED]

## Quality & Compliance

### Quality Inspection
**Definition**: A systematic examination of materials or products to verify conformance to specifications. Inspections can be incoming (from suppliers), in-process (during production), or final (before shipping).

**Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status

**Related Concepts**: Product, Supplier, Purchase Receipt, Work Order, Quality Standar... [TRUNCATED]

## Reporting & Analytics

### Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
**Definition**: A quantifiable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives. KPIs can be financial, operational, customer-facing, or employee-related.

**Common KPIs**: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield

### Financial Statement
**Definition**: Formal reports summarizing financial performance and position. Primary sta... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Accounts Receivable
entities_post_resolution.definition: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | **Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows. | **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority

entities_post_resolution.name: Account
entities_post_resolution.definition: A general ledger account in a chart of accounts, identified by account_id, account_number, and account_name, with attributes such as account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Position Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: An identifier for a job position/role within the organization used to link an employee to a specific position.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Cash Flow Statement
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial statement that summarizes a company's revenues, expenses, and net income over a defined period.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Primary statements include Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Cash Flow Statement. | Types: Balance Sheet (assets, liabilities, equity), Income Statement (revenue, expenses, profit), Cash Flow Statement (operating, investing, financing activities)

entities_post_resolution.name: Key Performance Indicator (Kpi)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A measurable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives, encompassing financial, operational, customer-facing, and employee-related indicators.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Common KPIs: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield | Definition: A quantifiable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives. KPIs can be financial, operational, customer-facing, or employee-related.

entities_post_resolution.name: Project Task
entities_post_resolution.definition: A project task is a discrete piece of work within a project that must be completed to advance the project.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A specific work item within a project that must be completed. | Definition: A temporary endeavor with defined objectives, deliverables, timelines, and resources.

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Purchase Order is a commercial document issued by a buyer to a seller indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services, typically going through approval workflows.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Purchase Order
**Definition**: A commercial document issued by a buyer to a seller indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services. Purchase orders go through approval workflows before being sent to suppliers. | ### Sales Order
**Definition**: A commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services. Sales orders can be in draft, confirmed, shipped, or cancelled status. | Definition: High-volume records generated by business operations such as orders, invoices, payments, and inventory movements.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment Method
entities_post_resolution.definition: The shipping_method attribute representing the chosen method for transferring goods between warehouses in a transfer record, with associated fields such as transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, and tracking_number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | Definition: The physical transportation of goods from one location to another. | Definition: A predefined path for moving goods between locations with specific transit times, costs, and handling requirements.

entities_post_resolution.name: Supplier Contract
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal agreement between the company and a supplier detailing terms, pricing, and service level agreements (SLAs) governing their contractual relationship.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Supplier Contract
**Definition**: A formal agreement between the company and a supplier defining terms, conditions, pricing, and service level agreements (SLAs). Contracts can be fixed-price, cost-plus, or rate-based. | ### Supplier
**Definition**: An external entity that provides goods or services to the company. Suppliers are evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost. Each supplier has a credit rating and payment terms. | Examples include Customer, Product, Supplier, and Employee records.

entities_post_resolution.name: Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: A physical location where inventory is stored and managed, identified by a warehouse_id and characterized by its warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, and capacity, with transfer records referencing from_warehouse_id and to_warehouse_id.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory. | **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | **Attributes**: transaction_id, product_id, warehouse_id, transaction_type, quantity, transaction_date, reference_type, reference_id, unit_cost | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Capacity Cubic Meters
entities_post_resolution.definition: On-hand quantity of a specific product in a particular bin/location within a warehouse.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id | **Attributes**: transaction_id, product_id, warehouse_id, transaction_type, quantity, transaction_date, reference_type, reference_id, unit_cost

entities_post_resolution.name: Collection Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Collection_status denotes the current state of a debt-collection action for a specific AR item (ar_id, invoice_id, customer_id), including due date, amount due, days overdue, and last contact date.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date | **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status | **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit | **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status | ### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employ

entities_post_resolution.name: Currency Codes
entities_post_resolution.definition: A code set used to identify different currencies within data governance contexts.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Examples include currency codes, country codes, unit measures, and tax categories. | **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Invoice Discount Terms
entities_post_resolution.definition: A set of discount terms applied to an accounts payable invoice, indicating whether a discount is available and the date until which it remains valid.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority

entities_post_resolution.name: External Entity
entities_post_resolution.definition: An external entity that provides goods or services to the company (a supplier), evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost, with credit terms and a credit rating.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Supplier
**Definition**: An external entity that provides goods or services to the company. Suppliers are evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost. Each supplier has a credit rating and payment terms. | ### Customer
**Definition**: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from the company. Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

entities_post_resolution.name: Warehouse Location
entities_post_resolution.definition: A physical location where inventory is stored, including warehouses that are company-owned, third-party logistics facilities, or virtual/transit locations.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | ### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Priority
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment_priority represents the priority level assigned to a payment for processing and settlement within financial workflows.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority | Definition: High-volume records generated by business operations such as orders, invoices, payments, and inventory movements. | ### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Reference Type
entities_post_resolution.definition: reference_id is the unique identifier of the reference associated with a transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: transaction_id, product_id, warehouse_id, transaction_type, quantity, transaction_date, reference_type, reference_id, unit_cost

entities_post_resolution.name: Source Document Type
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier for the source document associated with an accounting entry.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Total Credit
entities_post_resolution.definition: Total_credit: the sum of all credit amounts in a single accounting entry, representing the credits side of a double-entry transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Audit Log
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A chronological record of system events including logins, data changes, approvals, and errors. Audit logs support security monitoring and compliance requirements.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A chronological record of system events including logins, data changes, approvals, and errors. Audit logs support security monitoring and compliance requirements.

entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Bin Location
**Definition**: A specific storage location within a warehouse. Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away. | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

Budgets are compared to actual results for variance analysis. | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status

entities_post_resolution.definition:
### General Ledger Account
**Definition**: A chronological record of all financial transactions for a specific account type. Accounts are organized into a chart of accounts with hierarchies for balance sheet and income statement. | **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status | **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Money Owed
entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata about different customer types, including identifiers, descriptive names, descriptions, whether a credit check is required, and the default payment terms for each type.

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customers, including identifiers, contact and demographic details, financial attributes, industry classification, and audit timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Customer_Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the addresses associated with customers, including address details, location identifiers, and a flag indicating the default address, along with the creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores the contact persons associated with customers, including their names, roles, contact details, and whether they are the primary contact for the customer.

tables_enriched.name: Product Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about product categories, including identifiers, codes, names, hierarchical parent category relationships, descriptions, and the timestamp when the category record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, classification, pricing, physical attributes, storage constraints, hazard status, and audit timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Price List
tables_enriched.description: Stores pricing catalogs with their identity, name, applicable currency, and the validity period and status for each price list.

tables_enriched.name: Product Price
tables_enriched.description: Stores pricing information for products, including the price, applicable minimum quantity, any discount percentage, and the date from which the price is effective, linked to specific products and pric... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores the high-level information for sales orders, including customer, scheduling, fulfillment, payment terms, currency, amounts (subtotal, tax, freight, total), status, priority, customer purchase o... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores each line item for a sales order, including product details, quantities, pricing, tax, and shipping dates, to support order fulfillment and invoicing processes.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice
tables_enriched.description: Stores invoice data including identifiers, related customer and order references, dates, currency, financial totals (subtotal, tax, total), payments, balance due, and status for billing and receivable... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Invoice Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line items for invoices, detailing each product sold, its quantity, pricing, tax, and the total for the line item.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed by the business, including amounts, dates, methods, and associations to customers and invoices.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about suppliers, including identification, contact and regulatory details, payment terms, currency and ratings, delivery performance, and timestamps for record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier_Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the physical or mailing addresses associated with suppliers, including address type, location details, and a flag indicating the primary address.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores contact information for suppliers, including a primary contact flag, contact details, and the timestamp when the record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contract
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of supplier contracts, including contract identity, supplier reference, terms, validity dates, renewal behavior, payment details, currency, value, status, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about purchase orders, including identifiers, supplier details, dates (order, required, promised), warehouse and buyer associations, financial amounts (subtotal, tax, freight, total... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line items for purchase orders, including quantities, pricing, taxes, discounts, and delivery promises by product and supplier.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of supplier deliveries received for purchase orders, including identifiers, dates, responsible personnel, shipping details, and status information.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for each purchase receipt, including quantities, costs, lot and expiration information, location, and whether inspection is required.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about warehouses, including their identifiers, location details, capacity, and managerial and status information for inventory storage operations.

tables_enriched.name: WAREHOUSE_ZONE
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about zones within a warehouse, including identifiers, zone classification, and whether the zone is temperature controlled.

tables_enriched.name: Bin Location
tables_enriched.description: Stores bin-level storage location data within warehouses, including identifiers, location details (aisle, shelf, position), bin characteristics, capacity in quantity and weight, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory On Hand
tables_enriched.description: Stores current inventory levels and related details for items on hand in warehouses, including quantities, lot information, costs, and critical dates.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory Transaction
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of inventory movements or transactions, including what product moved, from which warehouse and bin, the quantity and cost involved, reference sources, and audit information.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of stock transfers between warehouses, including identifiers, dates, routing method, tracking information, and status for each transfer.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for stock transfers between bins, including requested, shipped, and received quantities and the current transfer status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about each production line, including identifiers, location, capacity, setup time, status, and creation timestamp for manufacturing operations.

tables_enriched.name: Bill of Materials
tables_enriched.description: Stores the bill-of-materials data showing which components (products) are required to build a parent product, including quantities, unit of measure, scrap rate, and the effective date range for the BO... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Work Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of manufacturing work orders, including identifiers, quantities, dates, status, priority, and who created the record.

tables_enriched.name: Work Order Material
tables_enriched.description: Stores the materials required for work orders, including quantities requested and issued, associated product and bin locations, unit cost, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Schedule
tables_enriched.description: Stores scheduling and timing information for production work orders, including planned and actual start/end times, the production line assignment, status, and priority.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Standard
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata and details about quality standards, including identifiers, codes, names, types, versions, issue dates, status, and descriptive information.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Inspection
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of quality inspections for products, including inspection metadata, results, and any defects found, along with references to product, warehouse, and standard details.

tables_enriched.name: Non-conformance Report
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of non-conformance events, detailing the issue, its severity, root cause, and the corrective and preventive actions taken, along with status and relevant dates.

tables_enriched.name: Account Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata describing different account types, including identifiers, codes, names, and how balances are characterized for each type.

tables_enriched.name: General Ledger Account
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about general ledger accounts, including identifiers, descriptions, currency, status, and hierarchical relationships to parent accounts for financial reporting.

tables_enriched.name: Accounting Period
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about accounting periods, including identifiers, date ranges, fiscal year, and whether the period has been closed along with the timestamp when it was closed.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores individual journal entry records that summarize financial transactions, including amounts debited and credited, associated documents, metadata about creation and approval, and the entry's statu... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores individual ledger line items for journal entries, including accounts affected, debit/credit amounts, and references to related entities.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Receivable
tables_enriched.description: Stores accounts receivable data, including invoice details, amounts due, key dates, and the current collection status for each customer.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Payable
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of amounts due to suppliers, including original invoice details, due dates, discounts, and payment status for accounts payable management.

tables_enriched.name: Budget
tables_enriched.description: Stores financial planning data for budgets, including planned and actual amounts, across departments and accounts, per fiscal year, with currency and status information.

tables_enriched.name: Department
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about organizational departments, including hierarchy, management, budget coding, location, and status, along with a timestamp for when the department record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Position
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about job positions, including codes, titles, compensation ranges, department association, and metadata such as status and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Employee
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about employees including identity, hierarchy, employment details, compensation, contact information, and record metadata.

tables_enriched.name: Time Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of time entries for employees, including the project worked on, date, hours, and approval workflow details.

tables_enriched.name: Carrier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about transportation carriers, including identifiers, contact details, service levels, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Shipping Route
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about shipping routes, including route identifiers, origins and destinations, distance, estimated transit time, carrier, service level, pricing per kilometer, status, and creation t... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipments, including identifiers, origin and destination, timing, carrier and route details, tracking, costs, weight, and shipment status.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores details of each line item for shipments, including product reference, quantity, weight, and any linked reference to another line.

tables_enriched.name: Project
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about projects, including identifiers, names, type, associated customer and manager, timelines, budget versus actual costs, status and priority, a description, and when the record w... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Project Task
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about tasks within projects, including scheduling, assigned personnel, timing, effort estimates, and progress status for each task.

tables_enriched.name: APP_USER
tables_enriched.description: Stores user account information, including identifiers, contact details, authentication activity, and linkage to related entities such as employees, customers, and suppliers.

tables_enriched.name: Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about roles within the system, including identifiers, codes, names, types, descriptions, current status, and the timestamp when each role was created.

tables_enriched.name: User Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores the assignment of roles to users, including when a role was assigned, who assigned it, its expiry date, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Audit Log
tables_enriched.description: Stores an audit trail of changes and events, recording what occurred, who performed it, on which entity, and when, including the before-and-after values and client details.
